implementation: borderCurve: 'continuous' paired with borderRadius on View styles
anti_pattern: borderRadius alone without borderCurve
notes: Produces squircle corners matching iPhone display shape

anti_pattern: No haptic feedback on interactive elements
notes: Matches iOS tap and selection feedback patterns

anti_pattern: Custom icon fonts or PNG icon assets
notes: Native vector symbols matching iOS visual language

anti_pattern: Applying iOS shadow props to all platforms
notes: Correct per-platform shadow implementation

anti_pattern: Animated.timing() with easeInOut for interactive responses
notes: Physics-based spring matches UIKit's default animation

anti_pattern: ScrollView inside Modal for sheet-like UI
notes: Native feel with velocity-aware gesture dismissal

anti_pattern: Custom tab row with Pressable buttons
notes: Native UISegmentedControl on iOS

anti_pattern: Hardcoded paddingTop: 44 for status bar clearance
notes: Adapts to Dynamic Island notch and home indicator

implementation: allowFontScaling={true} on all Text components (default); never set to false
anti_pattern: allowFontScaling={false} to fix layout
notes: Respects user accessibility text size preferences

anti_pattern: <TouchableOpacity> or <TouchableHighlight>
notes: Finer-grained press state control; recommended in RN 0.63+

anti_pattern: Inline style objects {{ flex: 1 }} inside JSX
notes: Registered on native thread; avoids per-render object creation

implementation: const scheme = useColorScheme(); const colors = scheme === 'dark' ? darkColors : lightColors
anti_pattern: Hardcoded color values without dark mode variants
notes: Reactive to system appearance changes

anti_pattern: <ScrollView> with mapped children for long lists
notes: Recycled native cells; significantly faster than FlatList

anti_pattern: React Native's built-in Animated opacity for blur simulation
notes: True native blur matching iOS material system

anti_pattern: No keyboard handling causing input occlusion
notes: Standard pattern for forms and input screens

anti_pattern: FlatList with manual section header injection
notes: Native section headers with proper scroll behavior

anti_pattern: Static #000000 for text ignoring dark mode
notes: Maps to iOS UIColor semantic palette

implementation: Gesture.Pan() with GestureDetector for swipe interactions
anti_pattern: PanResponder legacy API for gestures
notes: Runs on UI thread; avoids JS bridge lag

anti_pattern: Animated.Value from core RN for complex animations
notes: Runs on UI thread; 60/120fps without JS bottleneck

anti_pattern: Custom animated overlay with absolute positioning
notes: Matches iOS modal presentation metaphor natively

anti_pattern: <Image> from react-native with no placeholder
notes: Blurhash placeholder prevents layout shift; better caching

anti_pattern: No scroll indicator styling
notes: Matches iOS dark/light indicator conventions

anti_pattern: No accessibility roles on structural text
notes: VoiceOver announces heading level matching HIG

anti_pattern: Ignoring status bar style changes on screen transitions
notes: Correct content color contrast over app backgrounds

implementation: FlatList ItemSeparatorComponent={Separator} with custom Separator view
